name: Happy Father's Day Card
subject: holidays/father-day
prompt: a cheerful greeting-card design with large bubble lettering reading Happy Father's Day across the middle, a small bow tie under the words, and a border of little hearts and stars framing the message

name: Best Dad Trophy
subject: holidays/father-day
prompt: a shiny award trophy standing on a wide base, two curved handles, a star on top, and a banner across the cup reading Best Dad, with a couple of sparkle marks around it

name: Number One Dad Mug
subject: holidays/father-day
prompt: a chunky coffee mug with a big rounded handle and gentle steam curls rising from the top, a large number 1 and the word Dad printed on the front, sitting on a small saucer

name: Father's Day Necktie
subject: holidays/father-day
prompt: a single large necktie hanging straight down with a neat knot at the top, decorated with simple stripes and polka dots, the word Dad in a small heart near the knot, a clean toddler-friendly shape

name: Dad and Kid Fishing
subject: holidays/father-day
prompt: a smiling dad and his child sitting together at the end of a little wooden dock holding fishing rods, a happy fish jumping out of the rippling water, a few reeds and a round sun in the sky

name: Dad at the Barbecue Grill
subject: holidays/father-day
prompt: a cheerful dad wearing an apron and a chef hat standing behind a barbecue grill flipping burgers with a spatula, hot dogs and burgers on the grill, a small puff of smoke and a bottle of sauce on a side table

name: Father's Day Bear Hug
subject: holidays/father-day
prompt: a dad kneeling down to wrap his arms around his small child in a warm hug, both with big happy smiles and closed eyes, a few floating hearts around them

name: Piggyback Ride with Dad
subject: holidays/father-day
prompt: a laughing dad carrying his giggling child on his shoulders, the child's arms raised with joy, both wearing casual clothes, a couple of birds and a small cloud overhead in a park setting

name: I Love Dad Heart
subject: holidays/father-day
prompt: one big rounded heart shape with the words I Love Dad written across the center in cheerful lettering, a simple dotted border around the edge of the heart, an easy bold design for little hands

name: Father's Day Balloon Bunch
subject: holidays/father-day
prompt: a bunch of round and heart-shaped balloons floating up on long curly strings tied together at the bottom, one balloon spelling DAD across them, a few small confetti shapes drifting nearby

name: Dad's Toolbox Close-Up
subject: holidays/father-day
prompt: a close-up of an open toolbox with a hammer, a wrench, a screwdriver, a saw, and a tape measure neatly arranged inside, a small Best Dad tag tied to the handle, simple sturdy shapes

name: Father and Child Reading
subject: holidays/father-day
prompt: a dad sitting in a big cozy armchair reading a storybook to his child curled up beside him, a small lamp on a side table, a houseplant in the corner, and a warm peaceful expression on both faces
